_note: GG1 daily Events (events.js + main.js reward tiers). Schedule + gauntlet proven by events-vectors.json.
_schedule: Deterministic from the UTC day: epochDay = floor(now_ms / DAY_MS); index = ((epochDay % 14) + 14) % 14 → ROSTER[index] is live. Anchor: epochDay 0 (1970-01-01 UTC) = ROSTER[0]; the 14-event set recurs every 14 days. No backend/clock baked in (now is injected).
_rewards: On finishing an event (eventTiersEarned, main.js): always grant event:<id> (participation = completion); grant event:<id>:well if score/total >= 0.7; grant event:<id>:ace if a flawless run (total>0 && score===total). score = #solved (skips never enter it; qMiss vestigial → solved == clean). Events pay NO gold — the reward IS the buff item. Live-window only: startEvent requires isLive(id).
_gauntlet: buildGauntlet(eventId, modes): seed = (hashStr(eventId) ^ (artSeed>>>0))>>>0 → mulberry32. For each questionMix {topic,n}: pool = modes[topic].build() sorted to a TOTAL order (localeCompare numeric, tiebreak raw string), seededShuffle the indices, take n → {p,a,topic}. Then seededShuffle the combined set (themed interleave). Fully deterministic (same set every play + every recurrence). Answers come from the curated topic sets (the same {p,a} the transforms export pins).

roster.name: The Halving Moon
roster.blurb: Under the cold moon every number must be cleft in two. Halve swiftly before the light fades.

roster.name: The Tables Gauntlet
roster.blurb: A relentless run through the times tables. Keep your nerve to the end of the gauntlet.

roster.name: Square Solstice
roster.blurb: On the longest day the standing stones demand perfect squares, and nothing less.

roster.name: Bondfire Night
roster.blurb: Stoke the bondfire — close every gap to a hundred before the embers die.

roster.name: The Carrying Caravan
roster.blurb: The caravan crosses the dunes, carrying and borrowing across every sum.

roster.name: Decimal Tide
roster.blurb: The tide shifts every digit by a place. Ride the powers of ten.

roster.name: The Fraction Feast
roster.blurb: Carve the feast into fair shares — thirds, quarters and fifths for all.

roster.name: The Percent Parade
roster.blurb: Banners of ten, twenty-five and fifty per cent march through the square.

roster.name: The Conversion Carnival
roster.blurb: At the carnival of forms, fractions become decimals and per cents at a turn.

roster.name: The Doubling Derby
roster.blurb: Two by two down the home straight — double every runner to the line.

roster.name: The Grand Melee
roster.blurb: Every discipline at once. Only the all-rounder survives the melee.

roster.name: Midnight Mastery
roster.blurb: When the bell tolls twelve, only the harder second forms remain.

roster.name: The Quickfire Quest
roster.blurb: Snap recall, no hesitation — halves, doubles, tables and bonds in a blur.

roster.name: The Sage's Trial
roster.blurb: The old sage tests the full breadth of your reasoning. Prove your mastery.
